languages.text: "Я не смогла, отец". {n}Лария смотрит не на вас, а на Себериана.{/n} "Позволь мне уйти достойно". {n}Она протягивает руку, подставляя ее под инъектор, и закрывает глаза.{/n}
"I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я не смогла, отец". {n}Лария смотрит не на вас, а на Себериана.{/n} "Позволь мне уйти достойно". {n}Она протягивает руку, подставляя ее под инъектор, и закрывает глаза.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I could not do it, father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}
"I could not do it, father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}
"I can't go on, father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}
"I can't go on, father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

languages.text: “我撑不下去了，父亲。”{n}菈丽雅的目光越过你，落在了塞贝里安身上。{/n}“请允许我有尊严地死去。”{n}她伸出手，放到注射器下方，闭上了眼睛。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我撑不下去了，父亲。”{n}菈丽雅的目光越过你，落在了塞贝里安身上。{/n}“请允许我有尊严地死去。”{n}她伸出手，放到注射器下方，闭上了眼睛。{/n}

languages.text: «No puedo seguir, padre». {n}Laria no te mira a ti, sino a Seberian.{/n} «Permíteme morir con dignidad». {n}Alarga la mano, la coloca bajo el inyector, y cierra los ojos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No puedo seguir, padre». {n}Laria no te mira a ti, sino a Seberian.{/n} «Permíteme morir con dignidad». {n}Alarga la mano, la coloca bajo el inyector, y cierra los ojos.{/n}

languages.text: « Je ne peux plus continuer, père. {n}Laria regarde Seberian.{/n} Permettez-moi de mourir dignement. » {n}Elle tend la main, la positionnant sous l'injecteur, et ferme les yeux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je ne peux plus continuer, père. {n}Laria regarde Seberian.{/n} Permettez-moi de mourir dignement. » {n}Elle tend la main, la positionnant sous l'injecteur, et ferme les yeux.{/n}

languages.text: "Daha fazla dayanamıyorum baba." {n}Laria sana değil, Seberian'a bakıyor.{/n} "Onurumla ölmeme izin ver." {n}Elini uzatıp enjektörün altına yerleştiriyor ve gözlerini kapatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Daha fazla dayanamıyorum baba." {n}Laria sana değil, Seberian'a bakıyor.{/n} "Onurumla ölmeme izin ver." {n}Elini uzatıp enjektörün altına yerleştiriyor ve gözlerini kapatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich kann nicht mehr, Vater." {n}Laria sieht nicht dich, sondern Seberian an.{/n} "Erlaubt mir, in Würde zu sterben." {n}Sie legt ihre Hand unter den Injektor und schließt die Augen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann nicht mehr, Vater. {n}Laria sieht nicht dich, sondern Seberian an.{/n} "Erlaubt mir, in Würde zu sterben." {n}Sie legt ihre Hand unter den Injektor und schließt die Augen.{/n}

languages.text: 「もう耐えられないわ、父さん」{n}ラリアはあなたではなく、シベリアを見つめる。{/n}「尊厳を持って死させて」{n}彼女は手を伸ばし、注射器の下に置いた。そして目を閉じる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I can't go on, Father." {n}Laria looks not at you, but at Seberian.{/n} "Allow me to die with dignity." {n}She extends her hand, positioning it beneath the injector, and closes her eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「もう耐えられないわ、父さん」{n}ラリアはあなたではなく、シベリアを見つめる。{/n}「尊厳を持って死させて」{n}彼女は手を伸ばし、注射器の下に置いた。そして目を閉じる。{/n}
